assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section

outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 42: '### Product Lifecycle'. Line 44: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle'. Line 45: 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT'. Line 46: 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200'. Line 47: 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:'. Line 48: 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. All 5 fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Line 50: '### Version Streams'. Lines 52-54 contain a table with headers 'Stream | Konflux Release Repo | Local Path | Security Matrix Path' and one data row: '2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Line 56: '### Source Repositories'. Line 60: 'backend | https://github.com/example/backend | upstream'. Line 61: 'frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui | upstream'. Both entries present with GitHub URLs.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: Line 1: '# Project Configuration'. Line 3: '## Repository Registry' with table. Line 10: '## Jira Configuration' with 5 fields. Line 18: '## Code Intelligence' with Serena documentation. Line 30: '### Limitations' subsection under Code Intelligence. Line 34: '## Bug Configuration' with 3 fields.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 34: '## Bug Configuration'. Line 36: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001'. Line 37: 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md'. Line 38: 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Line 42: '## Security Configuration'. Line 43: 'User opted in to Security Configuration when asked.' Lines 45-53 document Product Lifecycle fields collected (all 5 fields listed). Lines 55-59 document Version Streams collected. Lines 61-66 document Source Repositories collected.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Line 8: 'The following sections were newly added as the # Project Configuration block:'. Lines 10-11: Repository Registry newly added. Lines 13-14: Jira Configuration newly added. Lines 16-19: Code Intelligence newly added. Lines 21-24: Bug Configuration newly added with all 3 fields. Lines 26-27: Security Configuration marked '**Newly added** -- user opted in to security triage configuration'.
